sourceMovie.title: Hereditary
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Hereditary for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a mystery rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Ari Aster keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Entity
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hereditary clicked for you, The Entity (1982) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hereditary clicked for you, The Sixth Sense (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in mystery and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hereditary?
faq.answer: Try The Entity, The Sixth Sense, Zodiac—each shares DNA with Hereditary while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hereditary?
faq.answer: Hereditary (2018) is best described as Horror, Mystery, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hereditary worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
